data.title: Mayfair Gold to Acquire Three Ontario Exploration Properties Near Fenn-Gib for C$2.5 Million
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Mayfair Gold ( (TSE:MFG) ) just unveiled an update.

On April 2, 2026, Mayfair Gold announced a definitive agreement to acquire Plato Gold’s interests in the Guibord, Marriott and Holloway gold properties in Ontario for C$2.5 million in cash. The three exploration-stage assets, all located along or near the prolific Porcupine-Destor Fault Zone and within trucking distance of Fenn-Gib, expand Mayfair’s land position near its flagship project by more than 65% and provide critical ground for potential onsite infrastructure and future mine permitting.

The Guibord property, contiguous to Fenn-Gib and hosting Plato’s Silver Fox project, offers key access and historical high-grade drill intercepts that could support permitting and near-mine exploration. The Marriott and Holloway properties, situated east of the shuttered Holt and Holloway mines, add large blocks of early-stage ground with road access and historical drilling that encountered gold mineralization, positioning Mayfair to potentially extend the regional production profile as it derisks and advances Fenn-Gib into production.

Under the asset purchase structure, Mayfair will acquire 100% of the Marriott and Holloway properties and 50% of Guibord, with the C$2.5 million consideration held in escrow and released in stages as each property is transferred. The deal, which remains subject to customary conditions including ministerial consent for certain mining leases, underscores Mayfair’s strategic push to consolidate prospective ground along a major gold-bearing structure in the Abitibi belt, enhancing its exploration leverage and long-term development flexibility around Fenn-Gib.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:MFG) stock is a Hold with a C$5.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Mayfair Gold stock, see the TSE:MFG Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on MFG Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, MFG is a Neutral.

The score is primarily held back by weak financial performance (pre-revenue status, ongoing losses, and continued cash burn despite improvements). Technicals are supportive with a clear multi-timeframe uptrend and moderate momentum, while valuation remains challenged due to a negative P/E and no dividend yield. Corporate updates are positive for visibility and execution, but do not yet resolve the fundamental funding and profitability gap.

To see Spark’s full report on MFG stock, click here.

More about Mayfair Gold

Mayfair Gold Corp. is a Canadian gold development-stage company focused on advancing its 100%-controlled Fenn-Gib gold project in the Timmins region of Northern Ontario. Listed on the TSX-V and NYSE American, the company aims to develop Fenn-Gib into a new Canadian gold producer, with a strategy that combines mine permitting, project development and near-site exploration to enhance project economics.

Average Trading Volume: 114,928

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$295.2M

data.title: Wytec Extends Convertible Note Maturities and Warrant Terms
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An announcement from Wytec International, Inc. ( (WYTC) ) is now available.

On or about March 5, 2026, effective as of January 1, 2026, Wytec International, Inc. amended agreements with 11 noteholders covering $490,000 of 9.5% secured convertible promissory notes and $50,000 of unsecured convertible notes, extending their maturity from December 31, 2025 to December 31, 2026 and waiving any existing defaults. The move, which also affects notes held by director Christopher Stuart, provides Wytec with an additional year to manage these obligations, easing near-term balance-sheet pressures and signaling continued support from key creditors.

In consideration for the extension, Wytec lengthened by one year the expiration date of warrants issuable upon optional conversion of the notes and reduced the warrant exercise price to $1.50 per share, subject to adjustment based on future trading on the NASDAQ Capital Market or an equivalent venue. By sweetening warrant terms tied to its prospective market listing, the company is trading improved potential equity upside for investors in exchange for extended debt maturities, which may help stabilize its capital structure while aligning noteholders’ incentives with long-term share performance.

More about Wytec International, Inc.

Wytec International, Inc., a Nevada corporation, issues secured and unsecured convertible promissory notes and related warrants as part of its financing structure. The company’s capital-raising activities involve noteholders who can convert debt into equity, with terms linked to Wytec’s public trading price and potential listing on markets such as the NASDAQ Capital Market. These instruments indicate a focus on structured, convertible debt financing to support its operations and growth.

Average Trading Volume: 2,132

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

data.title: CBL & Associates Completes Major Refinancing, Boosts Dividend
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest announcement is out from CBL & Associates Properties ( (CBL) ).

On March 27, 2026, CBL & Associates Limited Partnership closed a $176 million floating‑rate, non‑recourse loan with Beal Bank USA, secured mainly by Mayfaire Town Center, Pearland Town Center, Southaven Town Center and East Towne Mall, as part of the second and final leg of refinancing its former $634 million secured term loan. Together with a previously completed $425 million non‑recourse financing, the transaction extended the term loan maturity by five years to 2031, is expected to improve annual free cash flow by more than $30 million, reduce overall debt by over $33 million and leave the company with an estimated cash balance exceeding $291 million.

Effective March 31, 2026, the compensation committee approved one‑time special transaction cash bonuses of $250,000 for CFO Benjamin W. Jaenicke and $25,000 for COO Katie A. Reinsmidt in recognition of their role in the refinancing. On March 30, 2026, the board also authorized a special cash dividend of $0.175 per common share for the first quarter of 2026, lifting the total declared first‑quarter dividend to $0.625 per share, a 39% increase that is expected to be reflected in a new annualized regular dividend rate of $2.50 per share, subject to future board decisions.

The most recent analyst rating on (CBL) stock is a Buy with a $42.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on CBL & Associates Properties stock, see the CBL Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on CBL Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, CBL is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by below-average financial resilience—high leverage and weaker 2025 operating/free cash flow despite an earnings rebound—while technical trends are constructive and valuation is favorable (low P/E and meaningful dividend yield). Recent refinancing activity is modestly supportive but does not fully offset balance-sheet risk.

To see Spark’s full report on CBL stock, click here.

More about CBL & Associates Properties

CBL & Associates Properties, Inc. is a real estate investment trust that operates through its majority owned subsidiary, CBL & Associates Limited Partnership, focusing on enclosed malls, lifestyle centers, open‑air retail centers and related outparcels across U.S. markets. The company generates income primarily from leasing retail and mixed‑use properties and arranging secured, non‑recourse financings backed by these assets.

Average Trading Volume: 162,821

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $1.22B

The latest announcement is out from Taiga Building Prod ( (TSE:TBL) ).

Taiga Building Products Ltd. has replaced its external auditor, appointing MNP LLP to succeed DMCL LLP, which resigned effective March 27, 2026. The board of directors and audit committee approved both the resignation and the new appointment, with MNP LLP to serve until the next annual shareholder meeting.

The company emphasized that DMCL LLP had issued no reservations or modified opinions on Taiga’s financial statements during the relevant period and that there were no reportable events in the auditor transition. Taiga plans to file the required regulatory reporting for this change within the prescribed timeframe, suggesting the shift is administrative rather than driven by financial reporting concerns.

An update from Chorus Aviation ( (TSE:CHR) ) is now available.

Chorus Aviation Inc. will release its first quarter 2026 financial results on May 8, 2026, with President and CEO Colin Copp and CFO Gary Osborne hosting a morning conference call for analysts, while media can listen in via telephone or webcast, and a replay will be available for one week. Later that day, the company will hold its 2026 virtual Annual General Meeting of Shareholders for investors of record, with online participation tools and meeting materials provided digitally through notice-and-access, underscoring a continued focus on accessibility and transparency for its shareholder base.

The Meeting will allow shareholders and proxyholders to attend regardless of location, submit questions before and during the session, and access a recording on Chorus’s website roughly 24 hours later, supporting broader engagement from its geographically dispersed investor community. These scheduled events mark key touchpoints for financial disclosure and corporate governance, offering stakeholders timely insight into Chorus’s performance and strategic direction as it manages a diversified aviation services portfolio.

data.title: Nexstar Media Completes $1.7 Billion Senior Notes Offering
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Nexstar Media Group ( (NXST) ) has issued an update.

On April 2, 2026, Nexstar Media Inc., a unit of Nexstar Media Group, completed a private offering of $1.725 billion of 7.250% senior unsecured notes due 2034 to qualified institutional buyers and certain non-U.S. investors. The company used the proceeds primarily to redeem its outstanding 5.625% senior notes due 2027 and to cover related fees and expenses, effectively refinancing nearer-term debt with longer-dated, higher-coupon securities.

The new notes, guaranteed on a senior unsecured basis by Nexstar Media Group, Mission Broadcasting and certain restricted subsidiaries, carry semiannual interest payments beginning October 15, 2026, and include optional redemption features, a change-of-control repurchase right and customary covenants limiting additional leverage and certain corporate actions. This issuance further defines Nexstar’s capital structure, extends its debt maturity profile and imposes ongoing restrictions designed to protect noteholders in the event of financial or strategic shifts.

The most recent analyst rating on (NXST) stock is a Buy with a $200.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Nexstar Media Group stock, see the NXST Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on NXST Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, NXST is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by strong cash-flow resilience despite a sharp recent earnings downturn and meaningful leverage. Technical signals add near-term caution, and valuation is a headwind due to a high P/E, while earnings-call guidance and digital/CW progress provide a supportive offset.

To see Spark’s full report on NXST stock, click here.

More about Nexstar Media Group

Nexstar Media Group, Inc., through its subsidiary Nexstar Media Inc., operates in the broadcasting and media sector, owning and operating television stations and related media assets across the United States. The company finances its operations and capital structure in part through the issuance of senior notes and other forms of secured and unsecured indebtedness to institutional investors.

data.title: TNL Mediagene Overhauls Leadership and Unveils 2026 AI-Focused Strategy
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest update is out from TNL Mediagene ( (TNMG) ).

On April 2, 2026, TNL Mediagene announced a leadership reshuffle that elevates Motoko Imada to Chief Executive Officer while she retains the Chief Operating Officer role, giving her full operational authority over profit and loss, budgets, and global day-to-day management. Former CEO Joey Chung moves to President to focus on corporate development, strategic transactions, and investor relations, while General Counsel TJ Park becomes Chief Corporate Affairs Officer and CTO Richard Lee takes on expanded duties as Head of R&D to build and commercialize the company’s AI and strategic technology products.

The board also moved to refresh governance, with co-founder Hiroto Kobayashi appointed as an interim director on April 2, 2026, filling a vacancy created by the February 13, 2026 resignation of director Jim Wu, which was not due to any disagreement with the company. Alongside these changes, TNL Mediagene outlined 2026 strategic initiatives aimed at achieving organic revenue growth, positive EBITDA and lower SG&A, accelerating a pivot from a media-centric model toward digital studio services, content commerce and AI-powered offerings, and conducting a portfolio review that could see underperforming or non-core digital media brands divested, downsized or closed as it sharpens its strategic focus and governance framework.

The most recent analyst rating on (TNMG) stock is a Hold with a $3.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on TNL Mediagene stock, see the TNMG Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on TNMG Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TNMG is a Neutral.

The score is primarily held down by very weak financial performance—severe losses, negative cash flow, and elevated leverage despite strong revenue growth. Technicals add downside risk given the broader downtrend (below key longer-term moving averages and negative MACD). Valuation is also constrained by ongoing losses (negative P/E) and no dividend support.

To see Spark’s full report on TNMG stock, click here.

More about TNL Mediagene

TNL Mediagene is a Tokyo-headquartered technology and digital media company that provides AI-powered advertising, marketing technology, content commerce, and data analytics solutions to brands and agencies across Asia. Formed in May 2023 through the merger of Japan’s Mediagene Inc. and Taiwan’s The News Lens Co., it operates multi-language digital media brands and is increasingly focusing on higher-value digital studio services and AI-driven products.

The company combines advertising and marketing technology platforms with a portfolio of established Japanese- and Chinese-language digital media properties to deliver integrated solutions in the evolving digital landscape. Its offerings span AI-driven advertising, digital studio services, content commerce, and advanced analytics, positioning it at the intersection of media, marketing, and artificial intelligence in key Asian markets.

data.title: Alternus Clean Energy Converts Debt via Preferred Equity Issuance
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest announcement is out from Alternus Clean Energy ( (ALCE) ).

On March 27, 2026, Alternus Clean Energy, Inc. raised $1 million in gross proceeds through a private placement of 2,150 shares of Series D Convertible Preferred Stock to an accredited investor, with the funds earmarked for working capital and general corporate purposes. Simultaneously, the company granted the investor a one-year put option that becomes exercisable after Alternus completes at least $8 million of equity fundraising, allowing the investor to require the company to repurchase up to 1,150 Series D shares at $1,000 per share.

In parallel on March 27, 2026, the board authorized up to 20,000 shares of Series D preferred stock, of which 10,283 shares were issued as of the report date, featuring a $1,000 per share value, a $0.10 conversion price into common stock with anti-dilution adjustments, full voting rights on an as-converted basis, no dividends and a 9.99% beneficial ownership cap on conversions. On March 31, 2026, the company further strengthened its balance sheet by settling an aggregate $8.267 million of promissory notes with two existing accredited debt holders via the issuance of 7,583 additional Series D shares and 684 shares of a newly created Series E Convertible Preferred Stock, which similarly carries a $1,000 per share value, a $0.10 conversion price with anti-dilution protection, as-converted voting rights, piggyback registration rights, no dividends and a 4.99% ownership cap on conversions, effectively converting significant debt into equity-like instruments.

Spark’s Take on ALCE Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, ALCE is a Underperform.

The overall stock score reflects significant financial challenges with negative equity and high leverage. Technical indicators reinforce a bearish outlook, while valuation metrics suggest caution due to negative earnings. Recent corporate events indicate positive steps but are not factored into the weighted score.

To see Spark’s full report on ALCE stock, click here.

More about Alternus Clean Energy

Alternus Clean Energy, Inc. is a Delaware-incorporated company operating in the clean energy sector. The company finances its activities through issuances of convertible preferred stock and related capital markets transactions, focusing on equity-based funding structures to support working capital and general corporate purposes.
